page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Manage your account and household preferences

household.title: Household
household.description: These settings are used as defaults when planning recipes and shopping lists.
household.size_hint: Used as the default serving count when adding recipes to a shopping list.
household.frequency_hint: Determines the default date range when creating a new shopping list.

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
delete_account.dialog_description: All your account data will be permanently deleted. If you are sure, please click "Confirm" to proceed. This action cannot be undone.
delete_account.success: Your account has been successfully deleted
